author: codex

scope.description: Codex-only deterministic identity cleanup prep for global project records only.
scope.selection_policy: Only high-confidence aliases for the same durable project were queued. Candidates were excluded when they looked like program-vs-project, phase-vs-whole-project, option/award/contract-modification, station-specific, or source-time status conflicts.

aliases.canonical_name: Rail Replacement and Maintenance on the Atlantic Branch
aliases.alias_name: Rail Replacement and Maintenance on the Atlantic Branch
aliases.reason: Same durable LIRR Atlantic Branch rail replacement and maintenance project. The target and alias share the exact project name and compatible rail replacement/maintenance project type; the alias's September 2023 timetable wording is a source-time support context, not a different project.

evidence.source_block_summary: Both cited LIRR timetable blocks list the same Atlantic Branch rail replacement and maintenance work among supported projects.

aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: exact durable project name, same railroad branch, compatible maintenance scope. Preserves timetable/date differences as source-time context.

guard_summary.alias_shape_reminder: data/identity-overrides/merges.json uses alias_id -> target_id entries; each proposal above names both canonical_id/target_id and alias_id explicitly.
positive_guards: Exact durable project name match for Atlantic Branch rail replacement and maintenance proposals.
Exact HC-07 / D704HC07 project-code match for HCT ventilation rehabilitation proposals.
Compatible project types and source-time statuses only.
negative_guards: No option, award, contract modification, or station-specific false friends included.
No alias already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json or visible prior identity prep batches included.

command_evidence: pwd && rg --files data/review_notes data/identity-overrides data/canonical LOG.md | sort
node read-only scan of data/canonical/projects.jsonl grouped by normalized project fields with current/prior alias exclusions
node read-only inspection of selected project records in data/canonical/projects.jsonl
node read-only inspection of selected evidence blocks under raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl
node read-only check that selected alias IDs are absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json and visible prior identity prep artifacts
